questions.question: Find the point of intersection of the lines \frac{x-4}{1} = \frac{y+3}{-4} = \frac{z+1}{7} and \frac{x-1}{2} = \frac{y+1}{-3} = \frac{z+10}{8}. Also find the plane containing them.
Find the equation of the sphere which passes through the circle xآ² + yآ² + zآ² = 5, x + 2y + 3z = 3 and touch the plane 4x + 3y = 15.

questions.eq: v = \log \frac{x^2 + y^2}{x+y}, \quad x \frac{\partial v}{\partial x} + y \frac{\partial v}{\partial y} = 1

questions.question: Find the minimum value of f = xآ² + yآ² + zآ² such that x + y + z = 1 and xyz = -1.
